Package neqsim.process.safety.opendrain

Class StidOpenDrainDataSource

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.opendrain.StidOpenDrainDataSource
All Implemented Interfaces:
OpenDrainReviewDataSource
public class StidOpenDrainDataSource extends Object implements OpenDrainReviewDataSource
Normalized STID/P&ID and tagreader JSON bridge for the open-drain review engine.

This class does not connect to STID or plant historians directly. Retrieval, OCR, P&ID interpretation, and tagreader reads remain in Python/devtools or task workflows. The Java core consumes normalized extracts so the review remains deterministic and testable.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors
